reviews.review_description: this is a really good game in my opinion at least there are some bugs some more game breaking in some are not. for example all projectiles mainly going to the floor instead of targeting the player like they're supposed to they only really hit you if you're extremely close to them. some of the attacks are also just unbearable many attacks in this game will make you look straight up which really hurts my neck. aside from that it's a really good game plus there's still many bosses they could add like normal flowery and asgore. what other problem i have is that they take music from the original undertale. ignoring all of that this is probably one of the best undertale vr fan games and one of the best bullet hills on vr if not the best. some characters or way too hard in some characters are way too ez. if they fix most of these problems this game would probably go triple platinum.

This game is nice but there are some things to improve. For example the sans fight doesn’t show you where the faster blasters are going to be so you just have to guess. I think with this and a few improvements the game could be great :)
good game but kinda buggy, also how on earth am i the only person to review the game its been months!?
